title: New "account" object field
excerpt: We recently added the country_code field to the account object. It will return the two-letter country code where the first account admin is located. Check out our documentation to learn more!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: We recently added the country_code field to the account object. It will return the two-letter country code where the first account admin is located. Check out our documentation to learn more!

posts.author: Theresa25 (Theresa Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your two-letter country code clarification.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem Theresa! Glad you’re using this feature.
